meta.name: IRI Empathy Scale
meta.description: The IRI is a 28-item self-report measure of empathy assessing perspective taking, fantasy, empathic concern, and personal distress.
meta.author: Davis MH (1983)
meta.reference: Davis MH. Measuring individual differences in empathy. J Pers Soc Psychol. 1983;44(1):113-126.
meta.instruction: Indicate how well each statement describes you.

questions.text: I daydream and fantasize, with some regularity, about things that might happen to me.
I often have tender, concerned feelings for people less fortunate than me.
I sometimes find it difficult to see things from the other guy’s point of view.
Sometimes I don’t feel very sorry for other people when they are having problems.
I really get involved with the feelings of the characters in a novel.
In emergency situations, I feel apprehensive and ill-at-ease.
I am usually objective when I watch a movie or play, and I don’t often get completely caught up in it.
I try to look at everybody’s side of a disagreement before I make a decision.
When I see someone being taken advantage of, I feel kind of protective towards them.
I sometimes feel helpless when I am in the middle of a very emotional situation.
I sometimes try to understand my friends better by imagining how things look from their perspective.
Becoming extremely involved in a good book or movie is somewhat rare for me.
When I see someone get hurt, I tend to remain calm.
Other people’s misfortunes do not usually disturb me a great deal.
If I’m sure I’m right about something, I don’t waste much time listening to other people’s arguments.
After seeing a play or movie, I have felt as though I were one of the characters.
Being in a tense emotional situation scares me.
When I see someone being treated unfairly, I sometimes don’t feel very much pity for them.
I am usually pretty effective in dealing with emergencies.
I am often quite touched by things that I see happen.
I believe that there are two sides to every question and try to look at them both.
I would describe myself as a pretty soft-hearted person.
When I watch a good movie, I can very easily put myself in the place of a leading character.
I tend to lose control during emergencies.
When I’m upset at someone, I usually try to put myself in his shoes for a while.
When I am reading an interesting story or novel, I imagine how I would feel if the events were happening to me.
When I see someone who badly needs help in an emergency, I go to pieces.
Before criticizing somebody, I try to imagine how I would feel if I were in their place.

ranges.label: Low Empathy
ranges.description: Your overall empathy score is below average. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Practice active listening
Try to consider others' perspectives
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities

ranges.label: Moderate Empathy
ranges.description: Your empathy score is in the typical range. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Continue developing empathic skills
Attend to cognitive and emotional empathy
Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust

ranges.label: High Empathy
ranges.description: Your empathy score is above average. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Be mindful of emotional boundaries
Channel empathy into prosocial actions
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities

perspective_taking.label: Low
perspective_taking.description: Challenging to adopt others' viewpoints. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

perspective_taking.label: Moderate
perspective_taking.description: Reasonable perspective-taking ability. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional
Maintain a positive outlook on life

perspective_taking.label: High
perspective_taking.description: Skilled at understanding others' views. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

fantasy.label: Low
fantasy.description: Rarely immerse in fictional scenarios. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

fantasy.label: Moderate
fantasy.description: Sometimes identify with fictional characters. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional
Maintain a positive outlook on life

fantasy.label: High
fantasy.description: Readily transpose into fictional situations. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

empathic_concern.label: Low
empathic_concern.description: Less sympathy for others in distress. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

empathic_concern.label: Moderate
empathic_concern.description: Typical sympathy and concern. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional
Maintain a positive outlook on life

empathic_concern.label: High
empathic_concern.description: Strong compassion for others. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

personal_distress.label: Low
personal_distress.description: Remain calm in emotional situations. This indicates that your current stress levels are manageable and you are coping well with daily challenges.
suggestions: Continue using your effective stress management strategies
Regularly check in with yourself and engage in relaxation activities
Maintain a healthy work-life balance
Cultivate hobbies and interests that bring you joy
Nurture healthy social relationships

personal_distress.label: Moderate
personal_distress.description: Some discomfort in tense situations. Mild stress is a normal part of life. Learning stress management techniques can help you handle it more effectively.
suggestions: Identify your main sources of stress and try to address them gradually
Learn time management and prioritization skills
Set aside 15-30 minutes daily for relaxation activities
Maintain moderate exercise and healthy eating habits
Practice saying no and setting reasonable boundaries

personal_distress.label: High
personal_distress.description: Significant anxiety in emotional situations. Your stress level is elevated and may be significantly affecting your physical and mental health. Seeking support and making adjustments is recommended.
suggestions: Seek professional counseling support
Evaluate whether adjustments to your current work or life situation are needed
Learn emergency stress-relief techniques for high-pressure moments
Ensure basic needs for sleep, nutrition, and rest are met
Consider temporarily reducing workload or seeking help to share responsibilities
